title: 100 TitanPRO™ Resin Folding Chairs Bundle
features: Elevate your event with our TitanPRO™ Resin Folding Chairs.
This 100-pack of wedding chairs is designed for style and durability, these chairs are perfect for weddings, parties, and conferences, providing comfort and elegance.
This product bundle features a pack of 100 of our popular Resin Folding Chairs.
Our wholesale resin folding chairs are a perfect fit for almost any application.
Perhaps the most popular padded wedding chair, they have become the standard for garden folding chairs, as they are made to look identical to traditional wood folding chairs.
Same weight and dimensions, but these chairs are stronger than any wood chair and will last through years of tough use.
The 100-Pack featured here is a great for anyone looking to replenish their event furniture inventory or striving for a big splash with their their first jump into the party rental industry.
Weddings, graduations, concerts, banquet facilities - you really can't go wrong by choosing any of our Resin Folding Chairs.

faq.question: Can I add more chairs to the bundle and get a discount on those chairs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add more chairs and qualify for the bundle discount. We recommend reaching out and asking for a quote!

faq.question: Do bundles take longer to ship than individual items?
faq.answer: No, all our products have the same ETA as long as they’re in stock!

faq.question: Can I get a mix of colored chairs within a bundle?
faq.answer: Yes, while this option is not available directly on our website, our sales team would be happy to assist you. Please contact one of our representatives, and we can create a custom bundle tailored to your needs.
